content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls this a "public beta" and says "still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple rejects App Store builds that present themselves as beta, test, or unfinished software — that's what TestFlight is for. Your release notes explicitly advertise a "public beta" and admit features are "still testing" with "rough edges," which may trigger review questions about build readiness. Rewrite the notes to describe the shipped features neutrally and remove beta/testing language before submitting.
